nasb.text: but to those who are selfishly ambitious and do not obey the truth, but obey unrighteousness, wrath and indignation.

esv.text: but for those who are self-seeking and do not obey the truth, but obey unrighteousness, there will be wrath and fury.

cnv.text: 卻以震怒和憤恨報應那些自私自利、不順從真理而順從不義的人；

ccb.text: 至于那些自私自利、违背真理、行为不义的人，祂的烈怒和怒气要降在他们身上。

csbs.text: 而对那些营私争竞、不肯信从真理、反信从不义的，就以震怒和愤恨回报他们。
